title: Tucky143's Godly Weapons
description: A mod that adds very powerful weapons
body: Godly weapons is a mod that adds more powerful weapons to the game. The main material is a new gem called, Celestium. It is used to make most of the powerful weapons, like ones that burn mobs, freeze them, or steal the life out of them. It also includes new mob drops and a new villager profession obtained by placing a new table. One of the key features is extended health obtained by combining heart pieces dropped by mobs. The purpose of the mod is to add more powerful weapons to the game to help you survive and have more fun.
